_comment: ADOPT: the model inventory the harness runs on (HG-0006). One entry per model ROLE. model_id and prompt_version MUST be pinned (no 'latest'/floating tags). high-tier roles need a passing eval run against THIS pin, plus an independent validation sign-off. Verified by scripts/model-provenance-check.mjs. Replace these demo values with your real models; keep the shape.
